class:
TYPEID_N5PLSKLWYN n5plsklwyn Składnik wynagrodzeń
XDF_PLACE_SKLADNIK_PARAM
function n5plsklwyn_as_text() n5plsklwyn_as_text = "" end function
function n5plsklwyn_pSchemat_change(oldval) n5plsklwyn_pSchemat_change = true
if not this_.pSchemat is nothing then this_.curParam1 = this_.pSchemat.curParam1 this_.curParam2 = this_.pSchemat.curParam2 set this_.pTerminNal = this_.pSchemat.pTerminNal this_.cConfParam1 = this_.pSchemat.cConfParam1 this_.cConfParam2 = this_.pSchemat.cConfParam2 end if
end function
function n5plsklwyn_copy_from (byref source) set this_.pSchemat = source.pSchemat this_.curParam1 = source.curParam1 this_.curParam2 = source.curParam2 set this_.pTerminNal = source.pTerminNal this_.cConfParam1 = source.cConfParam1 this_.cConfParam2 = source.cConfParam2 end function
